languages.text: "Занятная поделка. Выглядит так, словно собрал ее кое-кто поспособнее обычных ремесленников {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Занятная поделка. Выглядит так, словно собрал ее кое-кто поспособнее ремесленников {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}".

languages.text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."
languages.original_text: "Занятная поделка. Выглядит так, словно собрал ее кое-кто поспособнее обычных ремесленников {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

"An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

languages.text: 「興味深い作品だね。モンケイグの職人のそれよりも、より優れた技術を持った人によって作られたようだ」
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a mon-keigh craftsman."

traits.locale_text: 「興味深い作品ですね。モンケイグの職人のそれよりも、より優れた技術を持った人によって作られたようです。」

languages.text: “真是有趣的物件。看来造它的人，技艺远比寻常的{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}工匠要高明得多。”
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

traits.locale_text: “真是有趣的物件。看来造它的人，技艺远比寻常的{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}工匠要高明得多。”

languages.text: «Una obra interesante. Parece ser la creación de alguien más hábil que los típicos artesanos {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}».
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

traits.locale_text: «Una obra interesante. Parece ser la creación de alguien más hábil que los típicos artesanos {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}».

languages.text: "Ein interessantes Stück. Es wurde offenbar von jemandem geschaffen, der fähiger war, als ein {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}-Handwerker."
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

traits.locale_text: "Ein interessantes Stück. Es wurde offenbar von jemandem geschaffen, der fähiger war, als ein {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g}-Handwerker."

languages.text: « Voilà un objet intéressant. Il semble avoir été fabriqué par quelqu'un de plus capable qu'un artisan {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} typique. »
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà un objet intéressant. Il semble avoir été fabriqué par quelqu'un de plus capable qu'un artisan {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} typique. »

languages.text: "İlginç bir parça. Zanaatkâr bir tipik {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh'den{/g} daha yetenekli biri tarafından yapılmış gibi görünüyor."
languages.original_text: "An interesting piece. It appears to have been made by someone more capable than a typical {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} craftsman."

traits.locale_text: "İlginç bir parça. Zanaatkâr bir tipik {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh'den{/g} daha yetenekli biri tarafından yapılmış gibi görünüyor."
